items.summary: In App.tsx, after a user logs in and a realm is selected, query the backend for an existing character for that realm before showing any screen. If a character already exists for the selected realm in the current season, skip the CharacterCreationScreen entirely and route the player directly to the character sheet / dungeon select screen. The character creation screen must only be shown when no character exists for the chosen realm.

In the backend (main.mo), ensure the createCharacter function returns a clear #alreadyExists error variant when a character already exists for the calling principal in the selected realm and current season. The frontend must never receive an ambiguous error for this case.

In App.tsx, if createCharacter is called and returns an #alreadyExists error (e.g., due to a race condition or duplicate call), the frontend must silently redirect the player to the character sheet / dungeon select screen rather than displaying an error message or crashing.
